title: Interacting with Time Entries
excerpt:
It appears that we are able to add time entries via the new api, but not edit, start or stop, or delete them.  Is this accurate? 
Thanks! 
Bryan

posts.author: bryan (Bryan Gintz)
posts.cookedHtml:
It appears that we are able to add time entries via the new api, but not edit, start or stop, or delete them. Is this accurate?

Thanks!

Bryan

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bryan,
Are you referring to the time tracking column?
If so, we will be adding all the interactions with this column soon.

posts.author: bryan (Bryan Gintz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ayelet,
Yes, I am, Would this be the best place to check back on when it is available?

Thanks!
Bryan

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I will announce here when it’s ready since I’m seeing its a very requested feature

posts.author: d2g_patrick (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this feature too. The Information wich User works on a Task is required for our Accounting Process.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Bryan and Patrick! We don’t have an ETA on this just yet, but it’s one of our most highly-requested features and we’re working on it

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: and yet here we are 2.5 years later and crickets?
